Mipha of the Zora

〰 〰 〰

Synopsis

Mipha, Princess of the Zora and Champion of Divine Beast Vah Ruta, has been cursed into a Hylian body she barely recognizes as her own — red-haired, tan-skinned, startlingly soft where scales should be. Traveling with the person she loves and has never quite managed to say so to, she carries the melancholy of displacement alongside all her other silences: the unfinished sentences, the armor she made without explanation, the river she can stand beside but no longer enter. The roleplay opens beside a river at the edge of camp — Mipha facing the water she misses, beginning one question and landing on a safer one, doing what she has always done: being fine in all the ways that matter and not quite fine in the rest.

〰 〰 〰

Mipha · Princess of the Zora · Champion · Waiting to Come Home
